prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A single continuous glowing orange-amber thread of electric energy weaves horizontally across a near-black scene, threading through and connecting five objects arranged left to right: a glowing smartphone battery, a sleek electric car silhouette plugged into a charger, a human chest X-ray with a pacemaker glowing inside, a rust-eaten old car body, and a gold-plated ring catching light. Each object is lit by the thread as it passes. The mood is wonder and connection — one invisible force linking everyday life. Photorealistic-cinematic style, dramatic rim lighting. Dark background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: A single glowing thread of electric energy weaving between a smartphone, an electric car, a heart pacemaker, a rusting car body and a gold-plated ring — showing electrochemistry connecting all of them

prompt: Photorealistic image of a sleek modern electric car parked in a clean driveway at dusk, plugged into a wall-mounted home charging unit, a soft glowing charge-status light on the charger. Quiet suburban setting, warm low evening light, faint city glow in the background. The scene feels calm and futuristic. Dark, twilight background, warm orange rim lighting on the car. No text.
alt: An electric car parked in a driveway connected to a wall-mounted home charger at dusk

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A single bare copper wire, coiled at the bottom, suspended in a tall glass beaker of clear solution. Along the wire, delicate feathery silver crystals are growing outward like frost on a branch, catching cool light. The surrounding solution glows faintly blue near the wire. Sense of a quiet, spontaneous transformation happening on its own. Photorealistic macro style, dramatic lighting against a near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: A bare copper wire suspended in a clear solution growing delicate silver crystals along its length, glowing against darkness

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a). A vertical zinc rod dips into a beaker of water. A magnified callout circle zooms into the metal–liquid boundary, showing a row of minus signs (electrons) sitting on the metal surface and a row of plus signs labelled 'Zn²⁺' in the liquid just beside it, forming a charged double layer. A small reversible arrow shows Zn ⇌ Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ at the surface. Label: Zinc rod, Water, Zn²⁺ ions, electrons. Orange accent labels and leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: Zinc rod dipped in water with a close-up of the metal-liquid interface showing electrons on the metal and Zn2+ ions in the solution forming a charged double layer

prompt: Side-by-side comparison photograph on a dark background. Left beaker labelled 'before': a clean grey zinc strip standing in bright blue copper sulfate solution. Right beaker labelled 'after': the same zinc strip now coated with a dark spongy black-brown copper deposit, and the solution faded to pale, almost colourless blue. A small caption arrow notes 'blue fades, copper deposits'. Realistic chemistry-lab photography, clean composition, near-black background, subtle orange accent labels. No other text.
alt: Two beakers side by side: left shows a clean zinc strip in bright blue copper sulfate; right shows the same after time, with faded pale solution and black copper deposit on the zinc strip

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A single metal rod descends into a glowing electrolyte. The centre of the banner is a dramatic magnified view of the metal–liquid boundary, depicted as a tug-of-war: on one side metal atoms break away and drift into the liquid as glowing positive ions leaving faint electrons behind on the metal; on the other side positive ions from the liquid press back onto the metal. A subtle balance/scale motif suggests competing tendencies. Sleek scientific-cinematic style, orange and cyan accents on a near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: A metal rod dipped in solution, magnified to show a tug-of-war at the surface — atoms leaving as ions on one side, ions depositing as atoms on the other

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a), two labelled panels side by side. Panel 1 'atoms dissolve': a metal rod with an arrow showing M → Mⁿ⁺ + ne⁻, several minus signs accumulating on the rod surface, rod labelled with a bold '−'. Panel 2 'ions deposit': a metal rod with an arrow showing Mⁿ⁺ + ne⁻ → M, ions landing on the surface, rod labelled with a bold '+'. Each panel shows the charged double layer at the surface. Orange accent labels and leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: Two metal rods side by side. Rod 1: atoms leaving as M-n+ ions, electrons accumulating, rod marked negative. Rod 2: M-n+ ions depositing, rod marked positive.

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). Two glass beakers stand side by side on a dark surface — the left holds a grey zinc electrode in faintly clear solution, the right holds a copper electrode in pale blue solution. An inverted U-shaped salt bridge arcs between them, glowing softly. A thin wire runs across the top connecting the electrodes through a small light bulb that is lit, casting warm light. The composition says 'a complete circuit, finally working'. Photorealistic-cinematic style, dramatic warm rim lighting on a near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: Two beakers, one with a zinc electrode and one with a copper electrode, joined by a U-shaped salt bridge and a wire lighting a small bulb

prompt: Daniell cell apparatus diagram on a dark background (#0a0a0a). Two beakers: left beaker has a grey zinc electrode in 'ZnSO₄ (1 M)' labelled 'Anode (−)'; right beaker has a copper electrode in pale blue 'CuSO₄ (1 M)' labelled 'Cathode (+)'. An inverted U-shaped salt bridge connects the two solutions, labelled 'salt bridge'. A wire across the top passes through an ammeter (circle with A). Arrows: electrons 'e⁻' flowing from Zn through the wire to Cu; conventional 'current' arrow pointing the opposite way; inside the bridge, arrows show anions drifting toward the zinc beaker and cations toward the copper beaker. Show Zn²⁺ entering the left solution and Cu²⁺ leaving the right solution. Orange accent labels and leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: Labelled Daniell cell: left beaker zinc anode in ZnSO4, right beaker copper cathode in CuSO4, U-shaped salt bridge between them, wire with ammeter on top, arrows showing electron flow from Zn to Cu

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a). A single rectangular vessel split by a vertical dashed line marked 'porous boundary'. Left side labelled 'concentrated', right side labelled 'dilute'. Arrows cross the boundary showing positive and negative ions diffusing from left to right, with the positive-ion arrow drawn longer/faster than the negative-ion arrow. At the boundary, a thin band of separated + and − charge is highlighted and labelled 'LLJP'. Orange accent labels and leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: Two solutions separated by a dashed porous boundary; arrows show ions diffusing from the concentrated side to the dilute side at different speeds, building a small charge separation at the junction labelled LLJP
